prompt: 低饱和日式奇幻 RPG 场景，2D hand-painted background，1920x1080，清晰可读，画面下方 35% 留给对话框，柔和光影，轻微记忆褪色质感，不要现代物品，不要文字，不要 UI，不要人物特写。清晨村庄，低饱和暖光，远处有去往森林的路。

Full 1280x720 final art direction concept screen for the game Memory Backpack. Combine four chosen directions into one cohesive commercial game look: D structure, A clean brightness, C memory material, B item occupancy rules.

Overall style: bright colorful Japanese fairy-tale RPG, clean anime mobile game UI, fresh and readable, not ornate watercolor, not flashy. Palette: cream ivory, fresh leaf green, sky blue, coral peach, soft yellow, small warm paper shadows. Mood: gentle adventure with a little nostalgic memory feeling, not childish, not dark.

Screen layout: upper half is a practical battle/travel stage with sunlit forest floor and soft background depth. Chibi hero on the left and a cute nameless memory enemy on the right, both standing firmly on the same ground plane, clear silhouettes, no floating. Keep upper area simple so gameplay is readable.

Lower half is the core gameplay: a large multi-slot memory backpack board taking most of the bottom UI. It should feel inspired by tactical backpack inventory games: about 7 columns by 4 rows or 8 columns by 3 rows, many clearly separated square cells, thin stitched cloth grid lines, empty cells obvious. Left side is a discard pouch, right side is a new-memory pickup tray. The board uses paper-craft memory materials: cloth, stitched fabric, paper labels with no text, pressed leaves, ribbons, worn photo edges, soft painted wood frame, very little metal.

Item rules visible: memory items occupy different shapes and sizes: 1x1 soup bowl, 1x2 name tag ribbon, 2x1 wooden sword memory, 2x2 old photo, L-shaped folded map, vertical leaf branch, small pouch. Items are memory objects, not generic equipment. They must sit inside grid cells clearly and leave visible empty cells for drag-and-drop gameplay.

Quality constraints: polished game UI mockup, clean cell borders, no heavy frame, no thick leather, no big metal buckles, no overdecorated flowers, no western fantasy armor, no dark gothic mood, no greasy rendering, no muddy brown dominance, no AI blur, no clutter.

No readable text, no letters, no numbers, no logo, no watermark.

3x3 animation spritesheet for Memory Backpack hero walking cycle, using the reference character design exactly. Art direction A mature chibi hero: young teen, short dark brown hair, muted green scarf, small brown memory backpack, cloth roll, wooden sword, traveler clothes, worn boots. Keep the same character, same outfit, same proportions, same colors in every frame.

Canvas and layout: square spritesheet, 3 columns x 3 rows, 9 equal frames, clean spacing between frames. IMPORTANT FRAME ORDER: the animation is read left to right, top row first, then middle row, then bottom row. Frame 1 is top-left, frame 2 top-center, frame 3 top-right, frame 4 middle-left, frame 5 center, frame 6 middle-right, frame 7 bottom-left, frame 8 bottom-center, frame 9 bottom-right. The action must progress chronologically from frame 1 to frame 9.

Action sequence facing right, walk/run loop:
Frame 1: neutral standing contact pose, right foot forward, sword steady.
Frame 2: body dips slightly, weight shifts forward, backpack follows.
Frame 3: left foot lifts, scarf and cloth roll trail slightly.
Frame 4: left foot swings forward, body leans right, arms counter-swing.
Frame 5: left foot contacts ground, body lowest point, backpack bounces down.
Frame 6: body rises, right foot begins to lift, sword tilts back slightly.
Frame 7: right foot swings forward, scarf trails, clear forward motion.
Frame 8: right foot contacts ground, body stabilizes, backpack settles.
Frame 9: returns toward frame 1 neutral contact pose, seamless loop.

Style: clean anime 2D game sprite, readable at small size, mature chibi not toddler-like, paper-and-cloth memory texture, crisp silhouette. Each frame full body visible and centered within its cell, feet at same baseline.

Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only in every cell, no floor, no shadow, no scenery, no text, no letters, no numbers, no logo, no watermark. Do not use bright green in the character.

Avoid: shuffled frame order, random unrelated poses, inconsistent costume, duplicate identical frames, extra characters, plush toy style, oversized baby head, heavy armor, blur, cropped feet.

Action sequence facing right, sword attack:
Frame 1: ready idle stance, feet planted, wooden sword low, looking right.
Frame 2: wind-up begins, hero crouches slightly, sword draws back, scarf starts to trail.
Frame 3: stronger wind-up, body twists left, sword pulled behind shoulder, backpack shifts.
Frame 4: first step forward, front foot plants, body leans right, sword starts forward.
Frame 5: dash forward, body stretched, sword moving fast, scarf and cloth roll trailing.
Frame 6: main slash impact pose, wooden sword extended diagonally upward to the right, strongest action silhouette.
Frame 7: follow-through, body passes the strike, sword finishes arc, cape/scarf still moving.
Frame 8: recovery, hero slows down, sword lowers, feet regain balance.
Frame 9: returns to ready idle stance similar to frame 1, seamless reset.

Style: clean anime 2D game sprite, readable at small size, mature chibi not toddler-like, paper-and-cloth memory texture, crisp silhouette. Each frame full body visible and centered within its cell, feet near same baseline. No drawn slash VFX in the spritesheet; only character poses, because Godot adds slash effect separately.

Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only in every cell, no floor, no shadow, no scenery, no text, no letters, no numbers, no logo, no watermark. Do not use bright green in the character.

Avoid: shuffled frame order, random unrelated poses, inconsistent costume, duplicate identical frames, extra characters, plush toy style, oversized baby head, heavy armor, blur, cropped feet, slash effects covering the character.

Create a square 4x5 animation spritesheet for a 2D Godot game character sword attack, based on the provided reference character visible in context. Character: teenage chibi-stylized hero, short dark brown hair, muted green scarf, small brown memory backpack with cloth roll, patched traveler shirt and pants, worn boots, wooden sword. Keep the same outfit, same colors, same proportions, and same silhouette in all frames.

Canvas and layout: square spritesheet, exactly 4 columns x 5 rows, 20 equal rectangular frame cells, clean spacing between cells. IMPORTANT FRAME ORDER: the animation is read left to right, top row first, then row 2, row 3, row 4, row 5. Frame 1 is top-left, frame 4 top-right, frame 5 starts the second row left, frame 20 is bottom-right. The action must progress chronologically from frame 1 to frame 20.

Action sequence: a smooth sword attack facing right, all frames keep the hero facing right or 3/4 right, no back-facing turnaround, no sudden 180-degree rotation. Frame 1 idle ready stance. Frames 2-4 slight crouch and wind-up, sword draws back. Frames 5-7 step forward and gather force, scarf and backpack lag. Frames 8-10 short dash forward, body low, sword starts the arc. Frames 11-13 main slash through the target direction, strongest pose at frame 12, sword diagonal upward-right. Frames 14-16 follow-through, body continues forward, scarf trails. Frames 17-19 recovery, hero slows and lowers sword. Frame 20 returns close to frame 1 ready stance for a clean loop/reset.

Style: clean anime 2D game sprite, mature chibi, not toddler-like, readable at small size, crisp edges, paper-and-cloth memory texture, consistent character proportions. Make each character smaller than a full cell if needed so sword and motion are never cropped. Feet stay near a consistent baseline within each row.

Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key green background in every cell, no floor, no shadow, no scenery, no text, no letters, no numbers, no logo, no watermark. Do not use bright green in the character.

Avoid: shuffled frame order, duplicate identical frames, inconsistent costume, extra characters, back-facing frames, 180-degree turn, oversized baby head, plush toy style, heavy armor, slash VFX covering the body, cropped sword, cropped feet, AI blur.
